mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_SCHEDULE ( workspaceNo, creatorNo, title, description, location, start_dt, end_dt, isAllDay, created_dt, updated_dt ) VALUES ( #{workSpaceNo}, #{creatorNo}, #{request.title}, #{request.description}, #{request.location}, #{request.startDt}, #{request.endDt}, #{request.isAllDay}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_SCHEDULE SET title = #{request.title}, description = #{request.description}, location = #{request.location}, start_dt = #{request.startDt}, end_dt = #{request.endDt}, isAllDay = #{request.isAllDay}, updated_dt = NOW() WHERE scheduleNo = #{scheduleNo} AND deleted_dt IS NULL
UPDATE SAAS_SCHEDULE SET deleted_dt = NOW(), updated_dt = NOW() WHERE scheduleNo = #{scheduleNo} AND deleted_dt IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT SS.scheduleNo, SS.workspaceNo, SS.creatorNo, SM.nickname AS creatorNickname, SS.title, SS.description, SS.location, SS.start_dt AS startDt, SS.end_dt AS endDt, SS.isAllDay, SS.created_dt AS createdDt, SS.updated_dt AS updatedDt FROM SAAS_SCHEDULE SS JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SS.creatorNo WHERE SS.scheduleNo = #{scheduleNo} AND SS.deleted_dt IS NULL

SELECT SS.scheduleNo, SS.workspaceNo, SS.creatorNo, SM.nickname AS creatorNickname, SS.title, SS.description, SS.location, SS.start_dt AS startDt, SS.end_dt AS endDt, SS.isAllDay, SS.created_dt AS createdDt, SS.updated_dt AS updatedDt FROM SAAS_SCHEDULE SS JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SS.creatorNo WHERE SS.creatorNo = #{memberNo} AND SS.deleted_dt IS NULL ORDER BY SS.start_dt ASC

SELECT SS.scheduleNo, SS.workspaceNo, SS.creatorNo, SM.nickname AS creatorNickname, SS.title, SS.description, SS.location, SS.start_dt AS startDt, SS.end_dt AS endDt, SS.isAllDay, SS.created_dt AS createdDt, SS.updated_dt AS updatedDt FROM SAAS_SCHEDULE SS JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SS.creatorNo WHERE SS.workspaceNo = #{workSpaceNo} AND SS.deleted_dt IS NULL ORDER BY SS.start_dt ASC
